mapper.insert: insert into gateway_nodes ( gateway_node_id, node_name, host_name, advertise_host, http_port, ws_port, region, zone, site_id, status, version, metadata_json, registered_at, last_heartbeat_at, lease_expires_at, updated_at ) values ( #{node.gatewayNodeId}, #{node.nodeName}, #{node.hostName}, #{node.advertiseHost}, #{node.httpPort}, #{node.wsPort}, #{node.region}, #{node.zone}, #{node.siteId}, coalesce(#{node.status}, 'ONLINE'), coalesce(#{node.version}, 'unknown'), coalesce(cast(#{node.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{node.registeredAt}, #{node.lastHeartbeatAt}, #{node.leaseExpiresAt}, #{node.updatedAt} ) on conflict (gateway_node_id) do update set node_name = excluded.node_name, host_name = excluded.host_name, advertise_host = excluded.advertise_host, http_port = excluded.http_port, ws_port = excluded.ws_port, region = excluded.region, zone = excluded.zone, site_id = excluded.site_id, status = excluded.status, version = coalesce(excluded.version, gateway_nodes.version, 'unknown'), metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, last_heartbeat_at = excluded.last_heartbeat_at, lease_expires_at = excluded.lease_expires_at, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
